name: Bobbie's Spicy Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Sift together baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, ginger, allspice, raisins, oats, and 2 cups of flour into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creaming mixture, alternating with milk, until just combined.
5. Stir in the nuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
